pilotSeat.description: The index of the OMI_seat glTF node to use as the pilot seat / driver seat.

maximumSpeed.description: If non-negative, the speed at which the vehicle should stop accelerating further.

useThrottle.description: If true, the vehicle should use a throttle for forward movement. If maximumSpeed is non-negative, the throttle should be a ratio of that speed, otherwise it should be a ratio of thrust power.

inertiaDampeners.description: If true, the vehicle should slow itself down when not given input.
